text:
Created attachment 252831
portlinted patch

    net-mgmt/ipfixcol2: Fix port, partially revert f31a65e8b225b1e5665aaa7801fd6a31d2437157 (net-mgmt/ipfixcol2: mark this port as suitable only for few architectures, improve port)
    
Port build no more crashes poudrieire-devel. Some polishing should be reverted.
Port still looks fine to portlint(1).
